_workflow: RESTYLE - Change Style While Preserving Layout
_description: Apply new style while keeping composition. SD 3.5 Medium compatible alternative to ControlNet.
_best_practices: Denoise 0.4-0.6 for moderate restyle, 0.6-0.8 for major style change. Lower denoise = more preservation.
_note: ControlNet not available for SD 3.5 Medium. Use Img2Img with appropriate denoise instead.

inputs.text:
Restyle this children's storybook illustration.

NEW STYLE:
{{STYLE}}

SCENE CONTENT:
{{SCENE}}

CHANGES:
{{CHANGES}}

RULES:
- Maintain original composition and layout
- Apply the new style consistently
- Keep character positions and poses
- Consistent art style throughout
- No text, no watermark, no logo
wrong composition, different layout, moved elements, changed poses, blurry, low quality, photorealistic, 3d render, text, watermark, logo
